titleStmt.title: SII 29.39: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 39. (A.R. No. B. 812 of 1962-63.) ATNŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built in by the side of the steps of the Īśvara temple.

It states that when Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva was ruling over the empire from the capital Kalyāṇa mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Rēvarasa governed Eḍadore-nāḍu-2000 and mahāsāmanta manneya Nayyaparasa governed the territory (name not mentioned) from his capital Māhishmatīpura.

At this time daṇḍanāyaka Pōtimayya made a grant of some money (amount not specified) in the presence of Nayyaparasa and Sādhya-Śiva paṇḍitāchārya, the sthānapati of Pallēśvara of Mudugu[ṁ]dūru. Also the record has registered grants of 2 mattar of land each to Brahmapuri Chāmuṇḍa-mayya Shaḍangi and a Taḷāṟa.
The record is not dated. But on the basis of the rule of Trailōkyamalla mentioned here the record can be assigned to the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭā
raka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrī matraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamā
namācaṁdrārkatāraṁ saluttamire kalyā
ṇada nelevīḍinoḷu rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ rēvarasareḍedoṟe nāḍicchāsi
ramanāḷuttire svasti samadhigata paṁca
mahāśabda mahāsāmanta sakala lakṣmī
kānta māhiṣmatīpura paramēśvaraṁ madhya
dēśādhīśvaraṁ gaṁjāga ghaṭāmalla nāmādi sa
masta paśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā sāma
nta manneya nayyaparasaraṁ svastiya
maniyama svādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa
mōnōnuṣṭāṇa japasamādhi saṁpannarappa
mudugu(ṁ)dūru pallēśvara dēvara sthānādhipati śrī
matsādhya śiva paṇḍitācāryya(ru) miṁti
nibbaru miḻdu svasti samadhigata paṁca ma
hāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahā
pracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyaka vairi bhayadāya
ka nanniyamēru nāmādi samasta praśasti
sahita śrī maddaṇḍanāyakaṁ pōtimayya
jakkarasara prabhu sāmyadalli

samupa ḍi yadeyarttha
ma sarvanamaśyamāge mā
ḍi biṭṭar brahmapuri cā
muṇḍamayya ṣaḍaṁgige biṭṭa
kariya matta 2 taḷāṟa necara
ge biṭṭa kariya matta 2 Ida
nāva nōrvva naḷidaṁge
bāṇarāsi kurukṣētra
da brāhmaṇaru kavileya
maṁ koṁnda pāpa dilaydu gu
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō ha
rētu vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa
sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yate krimiḥ sāmānyō
yaṁ dharmasētu nṛpāṇaṁ
kāḷe kāḷe pāḷaniyō bha
dbhiḥ sarvvānē(tā)
vēṁdrā
Digital edition of SII 29.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
